recap:
- A workspace is required to use Mosaic AI Agent Bricks Preview (Beta).
- The feature necessitates Serverless Compute with environment version 4.
- Instructions for selecting the appropriate environment version can be found in the provided documentation link.
- Ensure that the workspace is properly set up to utilize the Mosaic AI Agent functionalities.
- Familiarity with serverless computing concepts may be beneficial for effective use.
